studios.name: Voodoo
studios.priority_reason: Larger org, longer sales cycle; Massive scale (1B+ downloads)
studios.outreach_angle: AI-driven content generation for hyper-casual development. Voodoo's $1B revenue target for 2026 creates urgency for scalable solutions. €175M financing secured in 2025.

studios.name: Homa Games
studios.outreach_angle: Homa's aggressive M&A and $165M funding creates need for scalable AI infrastructure to onboard multiple studios efficiently. Homa Lab platform integration opportunity.

studios.name: SayGames
studios.priority_reason: Enterprise size, complex sales; Massive scale (1B+ downloads)
studios.outreach_angle: SayGames' massive scale (7B downloads, 200+ employees) requires AI automation for content production at scale. $10M developer program active.

studios.name: Supersonic Studios (Unity)
studios.outreach_angle: Unity + AI integration for rapid hyper-casual development - AI infrastructure that lives natively in Unity workflows. White-box approach perfect for AI tools.

studios.name: Rollic (Zynga)
studios.outreach_angle: Live ops automation - Rollic's Zynga backing means enterprise-grade live ops perfect for AI automation. 8 #1/#2 US App Store hits.

studios.name: Kwalee
studios.priority_reason: Larger org, longer sales cycle; Massive scale (1B+ downloads)
studios.outreach_angle: AI for cross-platform game development pipeline - Kwalee's expansion into PC/console creates opportunity for AI tools that work across platforms. Devolver Digital investment (July 2024).

studios.name: CrazyLabs
studios.outreach_angle: AI for ASMR/satisfying game content generation - CrazyLabs' strength in satisfying/ASMR content (Acrylic Nails, Soap Cutting, Tie Dye) is perfect for AI-generated variations.

studios.name: Lion Studios (AppLovin)
studios.outreach_angle: AI-driven UA optimization and creative generation - Lion Studios' UA expertise aligns with AI-generated creative variants for ad testing.

studios.name: Boombit
studios.outreach_angle: AI for midcore game economy balancing - Boombit's midcore focus (Hunting Clash, Fishing Clash, Dino Bash) creates opportunity for AI-powered economy tuning.

studios.name: Amanotes
studios.outreach_angle: AI for procedural music generation and dynamic gameplay - unique angle for AI-generated music that adapts to gameplay in real-time. Invested in Reactional Music (7-figure, May 2023).

studios.name: Scopely
studios.location: Los Angeles (HQ), Barcelona, Seoul, Tokyo, Dublin
studios.qualification_notes: Too small (<10 employees); Low downloads and small team
studios.outreach_angle: AI-driven personalization - Scopely's match-3 games have deep economies. AI personalization for difficulty curves and offers could boost retention. Now #1 mobile games company in US.

studios.name: Gismart
studios.priority_reason: Larger org, longer sales cycle; Massive scale (1B+ downloads)
studios.outreach_angle: AI content generation for rapid prototyping - Gismart's high release velocity (Cool Goal 50M+, Fat 2 Fit 100M+) could benefit from AI-powered level design.
